data_formats: Static content (e.g. textual, reports on website pages, tables and graphs, PDF files)
description:
This is a modern online pomology resource, with the aim of providing up-to-date variety descriptions.
In the past, much of the information on the origin and history of varieties, as well as entire variety descriptions, has simply been copied or slightly modified. For this reason, Fruit Variety Preservation Network members of the Pomologen-Verein (PV) have verified the origin and history of each variety as far as possible. The descriptions have been compiled based on the authors' own observations. If information has been taken from pomological literature, this is indicated with a reference to the source. All descriptions and photos are subject to copyright.
name: Fruit treee variety profiles
data_ownership: Fruit Variety Preservation Network members of the Pomologen-Verein (PV) (Pomology Association)
data_contact: Coordinators responsible: Apples: Jens Meyer; Pears: Jan Bade; Stone fruit and other fruit varieties: Annette Braun Lüllemann
data_project_name: Erhalternetzwerk Obstsortenvielfalt funded i.a. by Heidehof-Stiftung
access_barrier: No, direct download/access through a web link
